extension.description: Use models from your OpenAI-compatible AI relay directly in the Copilot Chat model picker.
configuration.title: WeaveNet for Copilot
configuration.baseUrl.description: sub2api API base URL. The extension calls /models, /chat/completions, and /messages under this URL.
configuration.anthropicVersion.descripti: Anthropic protocol version header sent when calling /messages for Claude models.
configuration.openaiPromptCaching.descri: Send a stable prompt_cache_key for GPT models to improve OpenAI-compatible prompt cache routing.
configuration.openaiPromptCacheKey.descr: Optional override for the GPT prompt_cache_key. Leave empty to use a stable key derived from the current workspace.
configuration.claudePromptCaching.automa: Use Anthropic automatic prompt caching. A single top-level cache_control lets Anthropic advance the cache point as the conversation grows.
configuration.claudePromptCaching.disabl: Do not send cache_control for Claude requests.
configuration.claudePromptCaching.descri: Claude prompt caching mode. Automatic uses Anthropic's recommended strategy for growing multi-turn conversations.
configuration.debug.description: Write redacted request summaries and Claude cache usage to the WeaveNet output channel. API keys and prompt text are never logged.
configuration.modelNamePrefix.descriptio: Display prefix for models shown in Copilot Chat.
configuration.includeModels.description: Optional regular expressions. When set, only matching model IDs are shown.
configuration.excludeModels.description: Optional regular expressions. Matching model IDs are hidden.
configuration.maxInputTokens.description: Hard upper limit for input tokens advertised to Copilot. Lower this when an upstream OAuth model accepts less context than its model metadata reports.
configuration.maxOutputTokens.descriptio: Max output token count advertised to Copilot and optionally sent as max_tokens.
configuration.sendMaxTokens.description: Send max_tokens with chat completion requests.
configuration.supportsToolCalling.descri: Advertise tool calling support for relay models.
configuration.supportsImageInput.descrip: Advertise image input support. Enable only if your relay and target models accept image parts in OpenAI chat completions.
configuration.imageInputModels.descripti: Optional regular expressions that force image input on matching models. Model metadata is detected automatically from sub2api and OpenRouter.
configuration.disabledImageInputModels.d: Regular expressions that disable image input even when public metadata says a model supports it. Empty by default.
configuration.metadataRefreshHours.descr: How often to refresh cached OpenRouter model metadata, in hours.
configuration.requestHeaders.description: Extra headers sent to the relay. Do not put API keys here; use WeaveNet key commands.
